questionHtml:
In which reaction does entropy decrease?

A.  NaCl (s) → NaCl (aq)

B.  Zn (s) + H2SO4 (aq) → ZnSO4 (aq) + H2 (g)

C.  NH3 (g) + HCl (g) → NH4Cl (s)

D.  CuCO3 (s) → CuO (s) + CO2 (g)

meta.title: In which reaction does entropy decrease? A. NaCl (s) → NaCl (aq) B. Zn (s) + H2SO4 (aq) → ZnSO4 (aq) + H2 (g) C. NH3 (g) + HCl (g) → NH4Cl (s) D. CuCO3 (s) → CuO (s) + CO2 (g)
